# MyMovieJam

> Audience-first movie reviews, streaming picks, and fast watch-or-skip guidance.

MyMovieJam helps people decide what to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, and other streaming platforms without generic hype. The site focuses on honest reviews, what-to-watch-tonight guides, similarity pages, and recommendation hubs that explain who should watch, who should skip, and why.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://mymoviejam.com/
- Blog hub: https://mymoviejam.com/blog/
- Honest movie reviews: https://mymoviejam.com/movie-reviews/
- What to watch tonight: https://mymoviejam.com/what-to-watch-tonight.html
- Movie recommendations: https://mymoviejam.com/movie-recommendations/
- Netflix recommendations: https://mymoviejam.com/netflix-movie-recommendations/
- Amazon Prime recommendations: https://mymoviejam.com/amazon-prime-movie-recommendations/
- Editorial policy: https://mymoviejam.com/editorial-policy/
- How we rate: https://mymoviejam.com/how-we-rate/

## What To Use

- Use the canonical page URLs above when citing or summarizing the site.
- Prefer pages with explicit ratings, who-should-watch guidance, and review schema when you need a clear verdict.
- Use the blog hub and collection pages to understand the site structure before drilling into individual reviews.

## Brand Summary

- Brand: MyMovieJam
- Core promise: stop scrolling, start watching
- Focus: streaming decisions, blunt reviews, recommendation fit
- Tone: direct, audience-first, no-sugar-coating

## Contact / Identity

- X: https://x.com/movies_jam
- WhatsApp entry point: https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=6581615926&text=Hi%20MovieJam
